summary: Iteration 29 - Settlement Ledger, Payout Queue, Force Sync, Reconciliation Tests. All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend verified with all UI elements working. Fixed missing RefreshCw import in NenoExchange.js.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All settlement ledger, payout queue, force sync, and reconciliation features are working. Backend tests cover: login, deposit EUR, buy NENO, sell NENO (state=internal_credited), swap NENO (state=internal_credited), offramp NENO (state=payout_pending with payout object), force-balance-sync, ledger entries, payouts queue, reconcile, live-balances, and regression tests for buy/create-token/buy-custom-token. Frontend verified: Dashboard shows 'Crea Token Personalizzato' button and 'I Miei Token Personalizzati' section. NENO Exchange page loads with all tabs (Compra, Vendi, Swap, Deposita, Off-Ramp, Crea Token). Deposit tab shows Force Sync section with input field and Sync button.
frontend_elements_verified: Dashboard: '$NENO Exchange' card with 'Apri Exchange' button
NENO Exchange: All tabs (Compra, Vendi, Swap, Deposita, Off-Ramp, Crea Token)
Deposit Tab: QR code for deposit
Deposit Tab: Force Sync input field

bug_fixed.issue: Missing RefreshCw import from lucide-react causing runtime error
bug_fixed.fix: Added RefreshCw to the lucide-react import statement
